name: Called

rules.text: When you roll a success on an saving throw against a mental effect that would make you controlled, you get a critical success instead.
rules.title: {item|name}

description: You've heard the Call, and by resisting it, you've developed a bulwark against effects that target your mind. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saving throws against mental effects. If you roll a success on your saving throw against a mental effect that would make you , you get a critical success instead.
